# Longley's Restaurant & Bar

> Longley's is a neighborhood restaurant and bar in Branford, Connecticut, serving scratch-made American food, craft cocktails, and cold drinks. Located on Main Street with a full bar, an outdoor patio, live music every weekend, and free parking. Known locally for Taco Tuesday, Wednesday jukebox bingo, Friday happy hour, a $12 lunch menu, and private-party catering.

## Key facts

- Name: Longley's Restaurant & Bar
- Address: 249 W Main St, Unit 8, Branford, CT 06405
- Phone: (203) 488-5553
- Cuisine: American
- Price range: $$
- Hours: Tue-Thu 11:30 AM to 1 AM; Fri-Sat 11:30 AM to 2 AM; Sun noon to midnight; closed Mondays
- Reservations: Accepted via OpenTable; walk-ins welcome
- Amenities: Full bar, live music, outdoor patio dining, free parking, takeout, private events and catering
- Service area: Branford, East Haven, North Branford, Guilford, and New Haven, CT

## Pages

- [Home](https://longleysct.com/): Overview, weekly events, live music calendar, and specials
- [Menu](https://longleysct.com/menu/): Full food and drink menu
- [Catering menu](https://longleysct.com/catering-menu/): Catering and event packages
- [Private parties & catering](https://longleysct.com/private-parties-catering-branford-ct/): Private event planning and off-premise catering
- [Photos](https://longleysct.com/photos/): Photo gallery of the restaurant, patio, and events
- [Why locals love Longley's](https://longleysct.com/why-locals-love-longleys/): About the restaurant

## Regular events

- Taco Tuesday: All-day taco and drink specials
- Wednesday Bingo: Free jukebox bingo at 7 PM
- Friday Happy Hour: 3 to 6 PM
- Live music: Live bands every weekend plus special events
- $12 Lunch Menu: Tuesday to Friday, 12 to 3 PM
